raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/models/assessment.py", "issue": "MIRT upgrade not implemented — still using 8 independent 3PL IRT models instead of unified multidimensional model. Violates research-backed design for psychometric validity.", "recommended_fix": "Rewrite assessment engine to implement 1 multidimensional IRT model with competency loadings. Estimated: 300-400 lines across models/, services/, and evaluation modules. Requires parameter re-estimation on historical data."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "The current scoring model inflates dimension independence, risking AURA score invalidity under audit. findings.issue: MIRT upgrade not implemented — still using 8 independent 3PL IRT models instead of unified multidimensional model. Violates research-backed design for psychometric validity.
findings.recommended_fix: Rewrite assessment engine to implement 1 multidimensional IRT model with competency loadings. Estimated: 300-400 lines across models/, services/, and evaluation modules. Requires parameter re-estimation on historical data.

whistleblower_flag: The current scoring model inflates dimension independence, risking AURA score invalidity under audit. This undermines VOLAURA's core value proposition.
